---
name: Bug report
about: Report a bug in the PostgreSQL table engine
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
---

## Summary

Describe the bug clearly.

## Operation or Function

Which operation is affected? (e.g. VLOOKUP, XLOOKUP, filter, data loading, CRUD)

## Inputs

Provide the input values, query parameters, or data setup.

## Actual Result

What result did you get?

## Expected Result

What result did you expect?

## Verified Against

- [ ] Verified against Excel
- [ ] Verified against direct PostgreSQL query
- [ ] Not verified yet

## Minimal Reproduction

Provide the smallest reproducible example possible.

## Environment

- PostgreSQL version:
- Rust version:
- OS:

## Additional Context

Include logs, failing tests, screenshots, or notes if relevant.
